name: compare LLM output against a source-of-truth API
_note: reference_command fetches the 'true' value from an API (here a local fake_api.py; in real use, a curl). Run: python3 -m llmval run examples/api_comparison_suite.json --no-judge

cases.name: PASS · LLM's stated ETA exactly matches the API
FAIL · LLM hallucinated a different ETA than the API returns
PASS · a field inside the LLM's JSON matches the API value
PASS · LLM's prose answer is semantically consistent with the API status
cases.output: Good news — your order is on its way and should arrive on July 20th.
